---- | -----
Password | PASSWORD
Consumer Secret | OAUTH1* (except SignatureType RSA_SHA1)
Private Key (PEM format or Base64 encoded PKCS8) | OAUTH2_JWT_BEARER, OAUTH1* (SignatureType RSA_SHA1), PRIVATE_KEY

---- | -----

Authorization Code | OAUTH2_AUTHORIZATION_CODE
Passcode for Private Key | OAUTH2_JWT_BEARER, OAUTH1* (SignatureType RSA_SHA1), PRIVATE_KEY
